title: HSM - Mending fix & Skyblock drill fix
description: Fixes the vanilla mending bug that resets the block break progress while also providing the same fix for Hypixel Skyblock drills.
body:
This mod uses mixins to fix the annoying vanilla bugs that resets your items where they shouldn't, like when mining a block using a mending pickaxe while picking up xp. This bug has been fixed in 1.14.2, reintroduced in 1.15, and partially fixed in a later version - only some items (bows, tridents, shields, etc.) have it somewhat fixed in the latest versions.

As a sidenote, since this mod was originally created for Hypixel Skyblock, I've also added a fix for drills by checking if the previous and current items have the same UUID while also making sure everything else is equal; This in turn makes it work with almost every item in Skyblock.

If you have questions, suggestions or reports please DM me on discord: rekterino

Enjoy!
